feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to consume SOAP read API "Manufacturing order - Send V2" in SAP? CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working on a SAP S/4 HANA Cloud public edition implementation project (version 2402)

Anyone can help me test and consume this API "Manufacturing order - Send V2" CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2, from POSTMAN?

https://api.sap.com/api/CO_PPINT_MFGORD_EXE_REQ_OUT_V2/overview

As per my understanding, this is an outbound API that allows to read production order data upon release, but we are not able to execute it yet. 

The request in Postman should be something like: https://host:port/ManufacturingOrderExecuteRequest_Out_V2? or just https://host:port/ as mentioned in API reference website?

In both cases, what should be added in the request body please to be able to retrieve data for one given Production Order? 

We tried first using the OData "Production Order V2" API https://api.sap.com/api/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/overview, but it was not sufficient for our requirement (for instance, this API does not retrieve the inspection lot information for a production order)

entry.title: PO save with "Duplicate owners: Contact LO-VC development" ABAP dump
entry.content:
When changing Tradename on a PO from Material data tab, I got an ABAP run time error when try to save the PO.

Short text of the error message
Duplicate owners: Contact LO-V
Long text of the error message
Technical information about th
Message class....... CUIB1
Number.............. 699
Variable 1..........
Variable 2..........
Variable 3..........
Variable 4.......... " "

Strange thing is it only happens to one specific PO, while everything works fine to all other POs (with exactly the same information, like supplier, material code, plant code, etc.)

There was no issue at all when changing tradename to other POs and save, but dump occurs every time when trying to save this particular PO, they were all processed by the same user.

Referred to note 610828, 537250 and 510129, it seems they are not applicable to what I am facing with the PO.

Anyone has any ideas?

Thanks in advance.

Br,

Tori Ji

entry.title: _EVT_OBJECT element in event container not filled after CREATED event of BOR Object BUS1505
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We are developing a (flexible) workflow to approve real estate contracts with BOR object BUS1505. We have created a workflow template and defined one workflow start event: "CREATED" for BOR object BUS1505 and its corresponding binding. 

After creating a contract via RECN, we can see that a "CREATED" event is raised in the SWEL for our Workflow(See pictures). Sadly the expression _EVT_OBJECT of the event container does not get populated with data. How is this possible? Am I missing some configuration?

When testing the workflow through "Test" (F8) in SWDD_SCENARIO and filling in a key, the _EVT_OBJECT element gets populated with data nicely as you can see in the pictures. It seems that when the "CREATED" event is raised normally, it inserts "IS" before the object key. 

Since we can not fill the event container with the right data, this also means that we can not fill the workflow container with the right data. Can someone help? Help is much appreciated.

entry.title: How to update equipments using the Migration Cockpit app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

Is it possible to update equipments using the Migration Cockpit? The Migration Object "PM - Equipment" allows us to create equipments in our system, but we'd like to know if there's a way of updating the existing ones using the Migrate Your Data app.

If the update isn't possible, could you explain us why?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,
Data migration expert team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Definition of fixed and variable cost in SAP BP for SaaS company.
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on the Advisory Service Project. We are in the process of designing a Profitability Analysis that aligns with SaaS businesses under the ECC 6.0 Ehp7 version.

I have a couple of questions regarding SAP Best Practices for the cloud(SaaS) industry:

1. How are fixed costs and variable costs defined and differentiated within the context of SAP Best Practices for Saas industries?

2. Does SaaS Industry also use Standard Price to measure standard cost for cost management?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: CCM Fixed amount contract - is collective correction after condition adjustment possible?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a fixed amount sales contract that creates partial settlements every month. Accruals are not needed. Flat rate of $100 is paid by the customer.

After 5 months the conditions change retrospectively to $90/month and the previous settlements need to be corrected. Is is possible to automatically create a single correction with 5 items $10 each referencing previously created invoices?

entry.title: Extend the field XBLNR in the MIRO / Fatura
entry.content: I would like to know if have some SAP notes to update the field XBLNR when create the MIRO for Brazil localization

entry.title: specific batch for specific customer
entry.content: Hello, Expert, we have some stock batch, after quality checking, these stock batch only can be sold to customer 1 or customer 2. now don't have SO for customer 1 or customer 2, how to mark these batch , then to ensure other customer SO not allocate these stock, and once received customer 1 or customer 2 SO, then first allocate these specific batch stock,if specific batch stock not enough, then allocate the normal stock. RGDS Joanna Qiu

entry.title: Go-live with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud in the middle of their Fiscal period / calendar
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I wanted to know what are the challenges of going live with S/4 HANA Public Cloud in middle of the fiscal year or period.

I acknowledge this option has certain drawbacks and would like to better understand the challenges, approaches / solutions, and learnings from actual implementations.

Appreciate the valuable insights to this!

Thanks 
Shimul

#S/4 HANA Public Cloud # S/4 HANA

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Finance

entry.title: Demo Data in S4Hana
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

We just activated a new instance of S4HANA cloud, and my team is looking to populate it with demo data similar to what is available in the trial, as we are a new shop without a lot of historical data.

Does anyone know where I could find demo data? I found a few configuration templates, but I'm looking for actual records in order to figure out the integrations with some of our home grown systems. 

Thanks!

entry.title: Concatenate Child Nodes attribute to Parent Node Attribute
entry.content:
Hii all, 

I have a requirement of concatenating the property of leaf nodes to the parent node(shown in image). I have a multi-level hierarchy for the dimension, just need to concat the child attributes 1 level above to parent node attribute . Can anyone suggest how it can be achieved in BW or SAC.

Regards.

entry.title: How to find the module to a CDS-View
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to find the module that for example the CDS-View I_GLAccountLineItemRawData (with SQL-View IFIGLACCTLIT) belongs to, since I can only find CDS-Views in Datasphere via the module.

Can someone help me find the module that belongs to a specific CDS-View?

Thank you!
Madeleine

entry.title: Problem: Multiple Freight Settlement creation in SAP TM
entry.content:
For 1 freight order the system creates automatically different freight settlements to different dates automatically and that is not correct.

It should be that for 1 Freight order the system creates only 1 freight settlement document.

The steps are following in the system:

When departed it makes automatic goods issue of the delivery note.

Furthermore 1 Freight settlement is automatically created.

When the GI is registered then 1 correct freight settlement is automatically created (via JOBPLANER)

This example was correct.

But suddenly to a later point for example 03.01.2024 or 28.12.2023 a further freight settlement is automatically created. And that is not correct.

The yellow marked freight settlement documents were created automatically without any change in the system.

Here are some Screenshots:

 

I checked already the customizing and the master data I did not find an issue in these areas.

Is there maybe an SAP Note? Or is it there anything in Coding ABAP?

How is it possible to solve this problem?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Advanced intercompany sales (5D2), configure process step order
entry.content:
Hello,

I request support to know if it is possible to change the order of the pre-established steps.

For example I need the IVS intercompany invoice to be generated before the customer invoice-

Another need of the company is to be able to integrate a new step into the monitor value chain where a transfer can be made between plants of the same company to supply the plant that functions as a delivering company in the advanced intercompany model.

Greetings and thanks in advance

entry.title: cds view excluding lines with a selection NOT IN another table
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I'm looking for some help / advices on CDS view SQL syntax (I'm not a developer).

I'm trying to fetch datas from PRPS and PRPHI tables (I'm building a CDS view to populate a composite dimension in SAP Analytics cloud.

I'd like my WBS dimension to have a level property field populated from my CDS view

 

select distinct from prps

inner join prhi on prps.pspnr = prhi.posnr

inner join proj on prps.psphi = proj.pspnr

{ key prps.posid as ID, // prhi.posnr has internal format

prps.postu as DESCRIP,

proj.pspid as PARENT, // link to project

'lvl1' as TYPE }

where prhi.up = '00000000'

above "where" is working fine for isolating lvl1 wbs into a subset of data

How could I process to isolate lvl2 WBSs (second line of the screenshot for example) ?

(then I add it to my result set with a union)

Same for lvl3 WBSs ... the condition would be something like PRPS.PSPNR NOT IN (select distinct from prhi {prhi.up}) but it seem the "IN" keyword is not allowed in "CDS SQL"

How would you proceed ? (hope my need is clear)

Thanks in advance.

G.

entry.title: Billing for 2 types of services with different retention categories for the same client and company
entry.content:
Billing for 2 types of services with different retention categories for the same client and company.

There is a scenario in the service billing process, where the same customer for the same company bills for different services with different retentions.

 

If, during billing for services, retentions (with or without) are not adjusted in the BP, depending on the type of service billed, NFS-e and accounting are impacted.

 

Billing consulting service for BR20 company WITH RETENTION: 

WT agent activated to WTax Code T0, T8, T9, TI

Billing advertising service for BR20 company WITHOUT RETENTION: 

WT agent NOT activated to WTax Code T0, T8, T9, TI

entry.title: Sales order Currency is different from Accounting Document
entry.content:
Hi All:

Issue: in sales order currency is USD( same as Customer) and Invoice currency is changing to CNY( company code).

SO:

After Release to Accounting(VF02), the Amt.in loc.cur. is different。

Accounting Document:

Why the difference 0.01 add to line2?

What is this logic？

Please help me

entry.title: how to transport an ambient ui5 application
entry.content:
hello to all
I have some beginner doubts.
context:
I created a ui5 application in SAP BAS and did the deploy-to-abap to the ERP DEV environment.
Once the deploy is done, I transport the application to QAS.
My doubts are:
Is it ok what I did?
Is it possible to deploy directly to QAS?
When transporting from environments, what should I include in the transport TO?

Also, I must say that when I do this, the application only works in DEV and not in QAS. When I do a "test service" to the application from the trx SICF in DEV, the application opens correctly. But if I do the same in QAS, the application opens a white screen in the browser and says "file not found".

entry.title: Migration of SD - Condition Records for Free Goods
entry.content:
Hi Members, 

I am migrating the condition records for free goods using the SD - Condition Records for Free Goods Migration Object in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. During the migration, I need to input the condition table number for the condition type YA00 - Free Goods SD. However, I couldn't find the condition table number for the mentioned condition type in the system.

Then, when I simulate the migration project, it says, "For condition type YA00 and table 004, there are no valid access sequences."

I'm trying to find the KB but couldn't find any. Please help me with where I can check the condition table number and access sequence for the condition type YA00 - Free Goods SD.

Thanks.

Kenny

entry.title: Email configuration in S/4Hana Public Cloud for Purchase Order Quotation Email template
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I have gone through some blogs, but i am unable to find out, what are the steps need to configure to send S/4Hana Purchase Order Quotation email to receiver email.

We have activated DKIM process also which is for S/4Hana Public Cloud.

Kindly requesting our SAP experts to guide us.

Thanks in Advance.
